name: AirPods Pro (2nd Gen)
description: Active Noise Cancellation, Transparency mode, and personalized Spatial Audio. Up to 6 hours of listening time.

name: MagSafe Fast Charger (20W)
description: Snap on for fast wireless charging. Optimized for iPhone 12 and later models.

name: USB-C to Lightning Cable (1m)
description: Connect your iPhone, iPad, or iPod with Lightning connector to your USB-C enabled Mac or iPad Pro.

name: Crystal Clear iPhone Case
description: Thin, light, and easy to grip. This case shows off the brilliant colored finish of your iPhone while providing extra protection.

name: PowerBank 20000mAh (QuickCharge)
description: High-capacity external battery with dual USB ports. Fast charging for all your mobile devices on the go.

name: AirPods (3rd Gen)
description: All-new design with Spatial Audio. Sweat and water resistant for your active lifestyle.

name: Privacy Screen Protector
description: High-quality tempered glass that protects your screen from scratches and wandering eyes.
